Tema ETFs Surpasses $2 Billion in AUM in Under Three Years
Tema Appoints ETF Industry Leader Steve Munroe as President
Tema Surpasses $1bn AUM Two Years After Launch, Strengthens Team With Key Growth Hires
How to capitalize on the weight loss revolution with Tema Obesity & Cardiometabolic ETF (HRTS)
This weight-loss ETF has performed well in its first five months. How does it compare with cheaper alternatives?
Tema ETFs hops on weight-loss drug frenzy with its new cardiovascular fund

holdings.infoBox: HRTS is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 11.75%, UnitedHealth Group at 5.64%, Novo Nordisk at 5.00%, Roche Holding AG at 4.40%, and Merck & Co. at 4.16%.

overview.description: The Tema Heart & Health ETF (HRTS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that concentrates on companies focused on the treatment of cardiovascular diseases and/or metabolic diseases from companies all around the world. Using both top-down and bottom-up stock selection, the fund identifies innovative companies deemed attractive. HRTS was launched on Nov 20, 2023 and is issued by Tema.

data.title: How to capitalize on the weight loss revolution with Tema Obesity & Cardiometabolic ETF (HRTS)
data.text: The weight loss revolution sparked by Novo Nordisk last year is attracting many investors towards the high risk biotech sector. An ETF like HRTS gives a lower risk exposure to the sector.

data.text: A new exchange-traded fund needs an edge to attract investors. This might be its industry focus — a tall order in a crowded market with ETFs covering just about any industry you can imagine.

data.title: Tema ETFs hops on weight-loss drug frenzy with its new cardiovascular fund
data.text: Tema ETFs has launched a new exchange traded fund (ETF) that tracks popular drugmakers like Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly , aiming to tap into growing demand for their weight-loss and diabetes drugs.
